listing.name: Noodle Seed
listing.tagline: Build and operate MCP apps on Noodle Cloud
listing.description: The developer's coding agent writes the application source while Noodle guides, validates, deploys, inspects, diagnoses, and rolls back apps on Noodle Cloud. The connector gives Claude bounded access to selected organizations and environments so it can inspect apps and deployments, read redacted logs and events, diagnose failures, and perform an explicit deployment rollback.

authentication.account_requirement: A Noodle Seed account with access to at least one organization.
authentication.grant_boundary: Each connection is limited to the organization and environments selected during authorization.

use_cases: Inspect apps and deployments within the selected Noodle Cloud grants.
Investigate redacted logs, request events, metrics, and session chronology.
Diagnose application failures from bounded operational evidence.
Reactivate an eligible deployment after an explicit rollback request.
